task_completion.description: Verify that Screaming Frog SEO Spider was used to crawl the target website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider application is open with 'https://books.toscrape.com/' visible in the URL bar at the top, and crawl results/progress are displayed in the main window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the HTML crawl data was exported to the specified exports directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or Screaming Frog 'Save As' dialog showing a data export file (e.g., CSV or Excel) located in or being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the thin content report file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or file manager showing a file named 'thin_content_report.txt' located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes counts of pages categorized by word count.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying 'thin_content_report.txt' shows specific numerical counts for three categories: pages with <100 words, 100-300 words, and >300 words.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes a list of the 5 thinnest page URLs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying the report shows a list of exactly 5 URLs from books.toscrape.com, explicitly identified as the thinnest pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes remediation recommendations for thin content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displaying the report contains a section with actionable advice, strategies, or recommendations on how to address or improve the identified thin content pages.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl rather than just mocking the export file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog application open and actively displaying crawl data for the target site, not just a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the exported data comes from an actual crawl and contains the required metrics.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the exported CSV/Excel file is visible, it should contain realistic Screaming Frog columns (specifically 'Word Count') and multiple rows of data corresponding to books.toscrape.com.

integrity.description: Ensure the report was generated based on actual crawl data and not just copy-pasted boilerplate.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should contain specific, realistic URLs from books.toscrape.com and plausible numerical counts that align with a genuine crawl, rather than placeholder text or generic examples.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. Export directory: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/thin_content_report.txt. The exported data must contain a 'Word Count' column and at least 20 rows of data. The final report must be at least 400 characters long.
